hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.tsx ]]; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

echo '
========================================
[REMINDER] Session ending checklist:
  - New bug / error found?  → append docs/ERRORS.md
  - Stopped mid-task?       → write docs/WIP.md + commit wip:
  - PR merged + CI green?   → mark [x] in PLAN.md
========================================
'
